title: Employers
description: NYU Shanghai graduates have joined the labor force with great success, bringing their language skills, diverse backgrounds, and international mindsets to their first jobs. The Center for Car
text:
Employers
NYU Shanghai graduates have joined the labor force with great success, bringing their language skills, diverse backgrounds, and international mindsets to their first jobs. The Center for Career Development (CCD) regularly welcomes a diverse array of employers on campus and is eager to facilitate your search for qualified students and recent graduates. Join a career fair, host a one hour information session about your organization, or contact us below to find out how you can hire our students for internships or full-time positions.
CCD Introduction
Recruitment and Engagement
Terms and Conditions
Employer FAQs
Contact Us
Phone: 021-20595300
Email: shanghai.employer@nyu.edu
